result.query:
SELECT u.NAME as rep, d.STATUS_C as stage, COALESCE(a.NAME, d.NAME) as seller,
        d.PURCHASED_IMPLEMENTATION_SERVICES_C as work_type,
        TO_CHAR(d.CREATED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as created,
        TO_CHAR(d.DESIRED_GO_LIVE_DATE_C, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as go_live,
        ROUND(d.TOTAL_ANNUAL_GPV_C * COALESCE(fx.FX_RATE, 1), 0) as gpv_usd,
        d.CURRENCY_ISO_CODE as currency,
        DATEDIFF(day, d.CREATED_DATE, CURRENT_DATE()) as days_open,
        DATEDIFF(day, d.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE, CURRENT_DATE()) as days_stale
      FROM FIVETRAN.APP_SALES_SFDC.DEAL_SUPPORT_REQUEST_C d
      JOIN FIVETRAN.APP_SALES_SFDC.USER u ON d.OWNER_ID = u.ID
      LEFT JOIN FIVETRAN.APP_SALES_SFDC.ACCOUNT a ON d.ACCOUNT_C = a.ID
      LEFT JOIN FIVETRAN.APP_SALES.FX_RATE fx ON d.CURRENCY_ISO_CODE = fx.CURRENCY
      WHERE d.IS_DELETED = FALSE
        AND d.STATUS_C NOT IN ('Completed','Implementation Complete','Tasks Complete','Live','Rejected','Lost - No Seller Contact','Lost - Churn','Lost','No Action Required','Seller No Show','Transitioned')
        AND u.NAME IN ('Austin Crittenden','Meven Le Corre','Joe Pharaon','Moussa Kamakate','Brandon Redmond','Livia Horn-Scarpulla','Andrea Guevara','Griffin Ulsh','Miles McMillin','Josie Vogt','Lee Williamson','Paige Benik','Chelsea Falato','Megan Martchink','Michael Bavaro','Ashley McDonald','Olignne Diaz','Travis Castroman','Ruben Reynoso','Kalani Cuaresma','John Tudhope','Jasmine Johnson','Taylar Jones','Kat Gleason','Janayra Rivera Algarin','Paul Kim','Alexandre Garreau','Arantxa Abellan','Samuel Montalvo','Lupe Buitrago Echeverria','Merve Oancea','Lydia Doyle','Kerry Nelson','Francisco Alvarez','Kyle Watkins','Anish Patel','Rachel Elwin','Oleg Gnatovski','Olga Kanna','Eugeniu Vascu','Igor Rusu','Takao Kinjo','Misho Arai','Mary Hirata McJilton','Ben Braun','Macarena Castillo','Kristian Bojsen-Moller','Chandreyee Bose','Josh stoffels','Jamahl G','Meri Fakraufon')
      ORDER BY u.NAME, d.STATUS_C
